---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear, concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use case

What problem does this solve? Who benefits, and in what scenario?
Concrete examples are stronger than abstract motivation.

## Proposed solution

How you'd see this working — API shape, config keys, behavior.
A code or YAML sketch is welcome:

```python
# proposed usage
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Related issues, prior art in other libraries, or links to the underlying
problem domain.
